status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/methodology/ca/gc/tbs-sct.json for the Algorithmic Impact Assessment tool.

data.notes: Mandatory federal-government policy instrument (not a statute) governing use of automated decision systems in federal administrative decisions. Requires Algorithmic Impact Assessments (secid:methodology/tbs-sct.canada.ca/algorithmic-impact-assessment) scaled to risk level, transparency, and human-in-the-loop safeguards for higher-impact systems.
